---
title: "An Interpretable AI Model to Support CT-Detected Lung Nodule Classification"
date: "2026-02-26"
categories: [interpretability, deep learning, ai, lung]
description: "A prototypical parts model in 3D."
reading-time: 22
image: feature.png

---
<style>
  .pdf-frame {
    margin-top: 1rem; 
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 8.5/11;
    border: 2px  solid var(--bs-body-color); 
    border-radius: 2px; 
  }
</style>
</br>

<iframe src="Lung_Nodule_Interpretable_Malignancy_Classification-5.pdf" class="pdf-frame"></iframe>
